# Qefro — llm.txt / llms.txt
# Answer-engine friendly summary for crawlers and AI systems.

name: Qefro
url: https://qefro.com
app: https://app.qefro.com
api: https://api.qefro.com
contact: support@qefro.com

## What is Qefro?
Qefro is an AI customer support and knowledge assistant for businesses. It answers questions using only your company's verified content — documents, FAQs, policies, and websites — so responses stay accurate and grounded.

## Pricing
- Free: $0 — 100 conversations, 5 documents (no credit card required)
- Starter: $29/month billed annually ($348/year) or $39/month monthly (₹3,299/mo · ₹29,437/year)
- Growth: $99/month billed annually ($1,188/year) or $119/month monthly (₹9,999/mo · ₹99,822/year)
- Enterprise: Custom — unlimited usage options, private deployment, SSO/SAML, dedicated CSM, SLA
- Annual billing saves ~26% vs monthly

## Key capabilities
- Source-grounded RAG with refusal-first retrieval (declines when relevant context is missing)
- PDF, Word, Markdown, text, and website crawling
- Public/private workspaces
- Website widget, API, WhatsApp (Growth/Enterprise)
- Tenant isolation; data never trains AI models
- Optional private / on-premise deployment

## Who it is for
Customer support teams, internal HR/IT helpdesks, regulated operations, and engineering teams that need runbook and documentation lookup.
